steps.sql:
SELECT a FROM t2 EXCEPT SELECT a FROM t3
     ORDER BY a COLLATE nocase;

SELECT a FROM t2 EXCEPT SELECT a FROM t3
     ORDER BY a COLLATE binary;

SELECT a FROM t2 EXCEPT SELECT a FROM t3
     ORDER BY a;

SELECT a COLLATE nocase FROM t2 EXCEPT SELECT a FROM t3
     ORDER BY 1 COLLATE binary
